-- Hoogle documentation, generated by Haddock
-- See Hoogle, http://www.haskell.org/hoogle/


-- | TUI for managing a Hydra node
@package hydra-tui
@version 2.1.0

module Hydra.TUI.Config
data Theme
DarkTheme :: Theme
LightTheme :: Theme
newtype TuiConfig
TuiConfig :: Theme -> TuiConfig
[theme] :: TuiConfig -> Theme

-- | Default config used when no file is present or parsing fails.
defaultConfig :: TuiConfig

-- | Flip between dark and light themes.
toggleTheme :: Theme -> Theme

-- | Path to the persisted config:
--   <tt>$XDG_CONFIG_HOME<i>hydra</i>tui-config.yaml</tt>.
configFilePath :: IO FilePath

-- | Load config from disk, falling back to <a>defaultConfig</a> on missing
--   or unreadable files.
readConfig :: IO TuiConfig

-- | Persist the config to disk, creating the directory if necessary.
--   Silently swallows IO errors so an unwritable config path never crashes
--   the TUI.
writeConfig :: TuiConfig -> IO ()

-- | Parse the on-disk config text. Unrecognised content falls back to
--   <a>defaultConfig</a>.
parseConfig :: Text -> TuiConfig

-- | Serialise the config to its on-disk text form.
encodeConfig :: TuiConfig -> Text
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Config.Theme
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Config.Theme
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Config.TuiConfig
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Config.TuiConfig

module Hydra.TUI.Forms

-- | Render a UTxO entry as "txin#ix ↦ ₳ X.XXXXXX" for form labels. The
--   TxIn is shortened to the last 10 characters of the hash plus its
--   '#index' suffix.
renderUTxOAsAda :: (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO) -> Text
utxoRadioField :: forall s e n. (s ~ (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO), n ~ Text) => Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO) -> Maybe (Form s e n)

-- | Build a radio form for selecting one pending deposit (by <a>TxId</a>)
--   to recover. The form yields just the <a>TxId</a> — the full UTxO
--   breakdown is rendered separately in the recover detail panel (see
--   <a>drawRecoverDetail</a>).
depositIdRadioField :: forall s e n. (s ~ TxId, n ~ Text) => [(TxId, UTxO)] -> Maybe (Form s e n)

-- | Like <a>depositIdRadioField</a>, but use <tt>desired</tt> as the
--   initial selection if it is still present in the list (otherwise fall
--   back to the first entry). Used when rebuilding the recovery form after
--   the underlying <tt>pendingIncrements</tt> has changed.
depositIdRadioFieldWith :: forall s e n. (s ~ TxId, n ~ Text) => Maybe TxId -> [(TxId, UTxO)] -> Maybe (Form s e n)

-- | One-line summary of a pending deposit: shortened TxId plus the total
--   lovelace across all its outputs.
renderDepositSummary :: TxId -> UTxO -> Text
confirmRadioField :: forall s e n. (s ~ Bool, n ~ Text) => Form s e n
type LeftBracketChar = Char
type CheckmarkChar = Char
type RightBracketChar = Char
type FormFieldRenderHelper a n = (a -> Text -> Bool -> Widget n -> Widget n)
customRadioField :: (Ord n, Eq a) => LeftBracketChar -> CheckmarkChar -> RightBracketChar -> Lens' s a -> [(a, n, Text)] -> FormFieldRenderHelper a n -> s -> FormFieldState s e n

module Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types
data Severity
Success :: Severity
Info :: Severity
Error :: Severity
data LogMessage
LogMessage :: Severity -> Text -> Text -> UTCTime -> Text -> LogMessage
[severity] :: LogMessage -> Severity
[message] :: LogMessage -> Text
[detail] :: LogMessage -> Text
[time] :: LogMessage -> UTCTime
[rawJson] :: LogMessage -> Text
data EventHistoryFilter
ShowAll :: EventHistoryFilter
ErrorsOnly :: EventHistoryFilter
newtype LogState
LogState :: [LogMessage] -> LogState
[logMessages] :: LogState -> [LogMessage]
logMessagesL :: Lens' LogState [LogMessage]
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.Severity
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.Severity
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.Severity
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.LogMessage
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.LogMessage
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.LogMessage
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.EventHistoryFilter
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.EventHistoryFilter
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Logging.Types.EventHistoryFilter

module Hydra.TUI.Style
severityToAttr :: Severity -> AttrName
infoA :: AttrName
positive :: AttrName
negative :: AttrName
neutral :: AttrName
own :: AttrName
activeTabA :: AttrName
keyA :: AttrName
pendingA :: AttrName
headStateA :: AttrName
actionDescA :: AttrName
sectionHeaderA :: AttrName

-- | Dark theme — optimised for dark terminal backgrounds. We deliberately
--   use the bright ANSI palette for foreground colours so that text stays
--   legible on a true-black background, where the dim variants (e.g. plain
--   <tt>blue</tt> or <tt>brightBlack</tt>) blend into the background.
darkStyle :: s -> AttrMap

-- | Light theme — optimised for light terminal backgrounds.
lightStyle :: s -> AttrMap

module Hydra.TUI.Drawing.Utils

-- | Render a <a>HeadId</a> as its hex-encoded bytes (matches the Main tab
--   display).
prettyHeadId :: HeadId -> Text

-- | Render a <a>TxId</a> as its hex-encoded bytes (no quotes, no wrapper
--   type).
prettyTxId :: TxId -> Text
drawHex :: SerialiseAsRawBytes a => a -> Widget n
drawShow :: forall a n. Show a => a -> Widget n

-- | Render a full address as text.
drawAddress :: AddressInEra -> Widget n

-- | Highlight the given address if it matches the own address.
highlightOwnAddress :: AddressInEra -> AddressInEra -> Widget n

-- | Render a UTxO map grouped by address, with ADA amounts and global
--   1-based numbering across all entries (so users can confirm scrollable
--   views are scrolling).
drawUTxO :: (AddressInEra -> Widget n) -> UTxO -> Widget n

-- | Render a single UTxO entry: index, last part of the TxIn, and ADA
--   value. The TxIn is shortened to the last 10 characters of the hash
--   plus its '#index' suffix, derived structurally so it stays correct if
--   the rendering of <a>TxIn</a> ever changes width.
drawUTxOEntryAda :: Int -> (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO) -> Widget n

-- | Wrap a widget in a clickable, vertically scrollable viewport using a
--   single name for both. The shared name lets the mouse-wheel handler
--   (matching MouseDown on any clickable) target the corresponding
--   viewport, and lets keyboard handlers scroll it by name too.
scrollableViewport :: (Ord n, Show n) => n -> Widget n -> Widget n

-- | Render a lovelace value as ADA with the ₳ symbol.
renderAda :: Value -> Text

-- | Format a time duration as "Xd Xh Xm Xs".
renderTime :: (Ord t, Num t, FormatTime t) => t -> String

-- | Animated spinner character cycling with wall-clock time.
spinnerFrame :: UTCTime -> Text

-- | Remaining contestation time, or a "ready to fan out" notice. Used by
--   both the Main tab (head state panel) and the Funds tab (closed state).
drawRemainingContestationPeriod :: UTCTime -> UTCTime -> Widget n

-- | Status message shown when the contestation period has passed and a
--   fanout transaction can be submitted. Shared between the Main and Funds
--   tabs so the wording matches.
drawFanoutPossibleMessage :: Widget n

-- | Status message shown when the head has been finalized, including the
--   total ADA value of the distributed UTxO. Shared between the Main and
--   Funds tabs so the wording matches.
drawHeadFinalizedMessage :: UTxO -> Widget n

module Hydra.TUI.Options
data Options
Options :: Host -> Either FilePath SocketPath -> NetworkId -> FilePath -> Options
[hydraNodeHost] :: Options -> Host
[cardanoConnection] :: Options -> Either FilePath SocketPath
[cardanoNetworkId] :: Options -> NetworkId

-- | User key used by the tui client to commit
[cardanoSigningKey] :: Options -> FilePath
parseOptions :: Parser Options
parsecardanoConnection :: Parser (Either FilePath SocketPath)
parseNodeHost :: Parser Host
parseCardanoSigningKey :: Parser FilePath
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Options.Options
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Options.Options

module Hydra.Client
data HydraEvent tx
ClientConnected :: HydraEvent tx
ClientDisconnected :: HydraEvent tx
Update :: AllPossibleAPIMessages tx -> HydraEvent tx
Tick :: UTCTime -> HydraEvent tx

-- | All possible messages that expect to receive from the hydra-node.
data AllPossibleAPIMessages tx
ApiTimedServerOutput :: TimedServerOutput tx -> AllPossibleAPIMessages tx
ApiClientMessage :: ClientMessage tx -> AllPossibleAPIMessages tx
ApiGreetings :: Greetings tx -> AllPossibleAPIMessages tx
ApiInvalidInput :: InvalidInput -> AllPossibleAPIMessages tx

-- | Handle to interact with Hydra node
data Client tx m
Client :: (ClientInput tx -> m ()) -> SigningKey PaymentKey -> (UTxO -> m ()) -> (TxId -> m ()) -> Client tx m

-- | Send some input to the server.
[sendInput] :: Client tx m -> ClientInput tx -> m ()
[sk] :: Client tx m -> SigningKey PaymentKey
[externalCommit] :: Client tx m -> UTxO -> m ()
[recoverCommit] :: Client tx m -> TxId -> m ()

-- | Callback for receiving server outputs.
type ClientCallback tx m = HydraEvent tx -> m ()

-- | A type tying both receiving output and sending input into a
--   <i>Component</i>.
type ClientComponent tx m a = ClientCallback tx m -> (Client tx m -> m a) -> m a

-- | Provide a component to interact with Hydra node.
withClient :: forall tx a. IsChainState tx => Options -> ClientComponent tx IO a
data ClientError
ClientJSONDecodeError :: String -> ByteString -> ClientError
instance Hydra.Chain.ChainState.IsChainState tx => GHC.Show.Show (Hydra.Client.AllPossibleAPIMessages tx)
instance Hydra.Chain.ChainState.IsChainState tx => GHC.Classes.Eq (Hydra.Client.AllPossibleAPIMessages tx)
instance GHC.Generics.Generic (Hydra.Client.HydraEvent tx)
instance GHC.Exception.Type.Exception Hydra.Client.ClientError
instance GHC.Generics.Generic Hydra.Client.ClientError
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.Client.ClientError
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.Client.ClientError
instance Hydra.Chain.ChainState.IsChainState tx => GHC.Classes.Eq (Hydra.Client.HydraEvent tx)
instance Hydra.Chain.ChainState.IsChainState tx => GHC.Show.Show (Hydra.Client.HydraEvent tx)
instance Hydra.Chain.ChainState.IsChainState tx => Data.Aeson.Types.FromJSON.FromJSON (Hydra.Client.AllPossibleAPIMessages tx)

module Hydra.TUI.RenderMessage

-- | A fully-rendered API message, ready to be turned into a
--   <a>LogMessage</a>. The three representations are kept separate so the
--   TUI can show a short summary in lists, a structured detail view, and
--   the raw JSON when the user toggles the detail pane.
data RenderedMessage
RenderedMessage :: Severity -> UTCTime -> Text -> Text -> Text -> RenderedMessage
[$sel:rmSeverity:RenderedMessage] :: RenderedMessage -> Severity
[$sel:rmTime:RenderedMessage] :: RenderedMessage -> UTCTime
[$sel:rmSummary:RenderedMessage] :: RenderedMessage -> Text
[$sel:rmDetail:RenderedMessage] :: RenderedMessage -> Text
[$sel:rmRawJson:RenderedMessage] :: RenderedMessage -> Text

-- | Render any API message into its three representations: summary,
--   detail, raw JSON.
renderMessage :: UTCTime -> AllPossibleAPIMessages Tx -> RenderedMessage

-- | Convert a <a>RenderedMessage</a> to a <a>LogMessage</a>.
toLogMessage :: RenderedMessage -> LogMessage

module Hydra.TUI.Model

-- | TUI-local event wrapper so we can inject async results alongside Hydra
--   node events.
data TUIEvent tx
NodeEvent :: HydraEvent tx -> TUIEvent tx
UTxOQueryResult :: Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO) -> TUIEvent tx
L1UTxORefresh :: Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO) -> TUIEvent tx
TxBuildError :: Text -> TUIEvent tx
data RootState
RootState :: Host -> UTCTime -> TimeZone -> ConnectedState -> LogState -> ActiveTab -> Bool -> List Name LogMessage -> Maybe Text -> Maybe (Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO)) -> ActiveTab -> Theme -> Maybe (TxIdRadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name) -> EventHistoryFilter -> RootState
[$sel:nodeHost:RootState] :: RootState -> Host
[$sel:now:RootState] :: RootState -> UTCTime
[$sel:timeZone:RootState] :: RootState -> TimeZone
[$sel:connectedState:RootState] :: RootState -> ConnectedState
[$sel:logState:RootState] :: RootState -> LogState
[$sel:activeTab:RootState] :: RootState -> ActiveTab
[$sel:eventDetailRaw:RootState] :: RootState -> Bool
[$sel:eventHistoryList:RootState] :: RootState -> List Name LogMessage
[$sel:pendingAction:RootState] :: RootState -> Maybe Text
[$sel:l1UTxO:RootState] :: RootState -> Maybe (Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO))
[$sel:previousTab:RootState] :: RootState -> ActiveTab
[$sel:theme:RootState] :: RootState -> Theme
[$sel:recoveryForm:RootState] :: RootState -> Maybe (TxIdRadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
[$sel:eventHistoryFilter:RootState] :: RootState -> EventHistoryFilter

-- | Connection to the hydra node.
data ConnectedState
Disconnected :: ConnectedState
Connected :: Connection -> ConnectedState
[$sel:connection:Disconnected] :: ConnectedState -> Connection
data IdentifiedState
Unidentified :: IdentifiedState
Identified :: Party -> IdentifiedState

-- | Connectivity of the hydra node to the hydra network.
data NetworkState
NetworkConnected :: NetworkState
NetworkDisconnected :: NetworkState

-- | Synchronization status of the hydra node to the cardano chain.
data ChainSyncedStatus
InSync :: ChainSyncedStatus
CatchingUp :: ChainSyncedStatus
data PeerStatus
PeerIsConnected :: PeerStatus
PeerIsDisconnected :: PeerStatus
PeerIsUnknown :: PeerStatus
data Connection
Connection :: IdentifiedState -> [(Host, PeerStatus)] -> Maybe NetworkState -> ChainSyncedStatus -> HeadState -> Connection
[$sel:me:Connection] :: Connection -> IdentifiedState
[$sel:peers:Connection] :: Connection -> [(Host, PeerStatus)]
[$sel:networkState:Connection] :: Connection -> Maybe NetworkState
[$sel:chainSyncedStatus:Connection] :: Connection -> ChainSyncedStatus
[$sel:headState:Connection] :: Connection -> HeadState
type UTxOCheckboxForm e n = Form (Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO, Bool)) e n
type UTxORadioFieldForm e n = Form (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO) e n
type TxIdRadioFieldForm e n = Form TxId e n
type ConfirmingRadioFieldForm e n = Form Bool e n
data OpenScreen
OpenHome :: OpenScreen
LoadingUTxOForIncrement :: OpenScreen
SelectingUTxO :: UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:selectingUTxOForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name
SelectingUTxOToDecommit :: UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:selectingUTxOToDecommitForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name
SelectingUTxOToIncrement :: UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:selectingUTxOToIncrementForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name
EnteringAmount :: (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO) -> Form Double (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:utxoSelected:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO)
[$sel:enteringAmountForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> Form Double (HydraEvent Tx) Name
SelectingRecipient :: (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO) -> Double -> Form SelectAddressItem (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:utxoSelected:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO)
[$sel:amountEntered:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> Double
[$sel:selectingRecipientForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> Form SelectAddressItem (HydraEvent Tx) Name
EnteringRecipientAddress :: (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO) -> Double -> Form AddressInEra (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:utxoSelected:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> (TxIn, TxOut CtxUTxO)
[$sel:amountEntered:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> Double
[$sel:enteringRecipientAddressForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> Form AddressInEra (HydraEvent Tx) Name
ConfirmingClose :: ConfirmingRadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name -> OpenScreen
[$sel:confirmingCloseForm:OpenHome] :: OpenScreen -> ConfirmingRadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name
data SelectAddressItem
ManualEntry :: SelectAddressItem
SelectAddress :: AddressInEra -> SelectAddressItem
newtype ClosedState
ClosedState :: UTCTime -> ClosedState
[$sel:contestationDeadline:ClosedState] :: ClosedState -> UTCTime
data HeadState
Idle :: HeadState
Active :: ActiveLink -> HeadState
[$sel:activeLink:Idle] :: HeadState -> ActiveLink
data PendingIncrementStatus
PendingDeposit :: PendingIncrementStatus
FinalizingDeposit :: PendingIncrementStatus
data PendingIncrement
PendingIncrement :: UTxO -> TxId -> UTCTime -> PendingIncrementStatus -> PendingIncrement
[$sel:utxoToCommit:PendingIncrement] :: PendingIncrement -> UTxO
[$sel:deposit:PendingIncrement] :: PendingIncrement -> TxId
[$sel:depositDeadline:PendingIncrement] :: PendingIncrement -> UTCTime
[$sel:status:PendingIncrement] :: PendingIncrement -> PendingIncrementStatus
data ActiveLink
ActiveLink :: UTxO -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> [Party] -> HeadId -> ActiveHeadState -> ActiveLink
[$sel:utxo:ActiveLink] :: ActiveLink -> UTxO
[$sel:pendingUTxOToDecommit:ActiveLink] :: ActiveLink -> UTxO
[$sel:pendingIncrements:ActiveLink] :: ActiveLink -> [PendingIncrement]
[$sel:parties:ActiveLink] :: ActiveLink -> [Party]
[$sel:headId:ActiveLink] :: ActiveLink -> HeadId
[$sel:activeHeadState:ActiveLink] :: ActiveLink -> ActiveHeadState
data ActiveHeadState
Open :: OpenScreen -> ActiveHeadState
[$sel:openState:Open] :: ActiveHeadState -> OpenScreen
Closed :: ClosedState -> ActiveHeadState
[$sel:closedState:Open] :: ActiveHeadState -> ClosedState
FanoutPossible :: ActiveHeadState
Final :: ActiveHeadState
type Name = Text
data ActiveTab
MainTab :: ActiveTab
FundsTab :: ActiveTab
EventHistoryTab :: ActiveTab
ModalTab :: ActiveTab
selectingUTxOToIncrementFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
selectingUTxOToDecommitFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
selectingUTxOFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (UTxORadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
selectingRecipientFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (Form SelectAddressItem (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
enteringRecipientAddressFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (Form AddressInEra (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
enteringAmountFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (Form Double (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
confirmingCloseFormL :: Traversal' OpenScreen (ConfirmingRadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name)
openStateL :: Traversal' ActiveHeadState OpenScreen
closedStateL :: Traversal' ActiveHeadState ClosedState
timeZoneL :: Lens' RootState TimeZone
themeL :: Lens' RootState Theme
recoveryFormL :: Lens' RootState (Maybe (TxIdRadioFieldForm (HydraEvent Tx) Name))
previousTabL :: Lens' RootState ActiveTab
pendingActionL :: Lens' RootState (Maybe Text)
nowL :: Lens' RootState UTCTime
nodeHostL :: Lens' RootState Host
logStateL :: Lens' RootState LogState
l1UTxOL :: Lens' RootState (Maybe (Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO)))
eventHistoryListL :: Lens' RootState (List Name LogMessage)
eventHistoryFilterL :: Lens' RootState EventHistoryFilter
eventDetailRawL :: Lens' RootState Bool
connectedStateL :: Lens' RootState ConnectedState
activeTabL :: Lens' RootState ActiveTab
connectionL :: Traversal' ConnectedState Connection
peersL :: Lens' Connection [(Host, PeerStatus)]
networkStateL :: Lens' Connection (Maybe NetworkState)
meL :: Lens' Connection IdentifiedState
headStateL :: Lens' Connection HeadState
chainSyncedStatusL :: Lens' Connection ChainSyncedStatus
activeLinkL :: Traversal' HeadState ActiveLink
utxoL :: Lens' ActiveLink UTxO
pendingUTxOToDecommitL :: Lens' ActiveLink UTxO
pendingIncrementsL :: Lens' ActiveLink [PendingIncrement]
partiesL :: Lens' ActiveLink [Party]
headIdL :: Lens' ActiveLink HeadId
activeHeadStateL :: Lens' ActiveLink ActiveHeadState
eventHistoryListName :: Name
mainUTxOViewportName :: Name
fundsL2ViewportName :: Name
fundsL1ViewportName :: Name
emptyEventHistoryList :: List Name LogMessage
emptyConnection :: Connection
newActiveLink :: [Party] -> HeadId -> ActiveLink
isModalOpen :: RootState -> Bool
recoverHeadState :: UTCTime -> HeadState -> NodeState Tx -> HeadState
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Model.SelectAddressItem
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Model.SelectAddressItem
instance GHC.Show.Show Hydra.TUI.Model.PendingIncrementStatus
instance GHC.Classes.Eq Hydra.TUI.Model.ActiveTab
instance Prettyprinter.Internal.Pretty Hydra.TUI.Model.SelectAddressItem

module Hydra.TUI.Drawing.EventHistoryTab

-- | Render the Event History tab: a scrollable list of past log messages
--   with a detail pane showing the selected entry (summary or raw JSON).
drawEventHistoryTab :: RootState -> Widget Name

-- | Render a single log entry for display in event lists. Also used by
--   <tt>drawMainTab</tt> for the recent-events strip.
drawEventListItem :: TimeZone -> Bool -> LogMessage -> Widget Name

-- | Render the detail pane for a selected event, either as a summary or
--   the raw JSON.
drawEventDetail :: TimeZone -> Bool -> Maybe (Int, LogMessage) -> Widget Name

module Hydra.TUI.Handlers
handleEvent :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> BrickEvent Name (TUIEvent Tx) -> EventM Name RootState ()
handleTick :: HydraEvent Tx -> EventM Name RootState ()
handleHydraEventsConnectedState :: HydraEvent Tx -> EventM Name ConnectedState ()
handleHydraEventsConnection :: UTCTime -> HydraEvent Tx -> EventM Name Connection ()
handleHydraEventsHeadState :: UTCTime -> HydraEvent Tx -> EventM Name HeadState ()
handleHydraEventsActiveLink :: HydraEvent Tx -> EventM Name ActiveLink ()
handleHydraEventsLog :: UTCTime -> HydraEvent Tx -> EventM Name [LogMessage] ()
handleVtyEventsHeadState :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> Event -> EventM Name HeadState ()
handleVtyEventsActiveLink :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> Event -> EventM Name ActiveLink ()
handleVtyEventsActiveHeadState :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> Event -> EventM Name ActiveHeadState ()
handleVtyEventsOpen :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> Event -> EventM Name OpenScreen ()
handleVtyEventsFanoutPossible :: Client Tx IO -> Event -> EventM Name s ()
handleVtyEventsFinal :: Client Tx IO -> Event -> EventM Name s ()
handleVtyEventsScrollable :: Event -> EventM Name RootState ()
syncEventHistoryList :: EventM Name RootState ()
applyEventHistoryFilter :: EventHistoryFilter -> [LogMessage] -> [LogMessage]
toggleEventHistoryFilter :: EventHistoryFilter -> EventHistoryFilter
myAvailableUTxO :: NetworkId -> VerificationKey PaymentKey -> UTxO -> Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO)
mkMyAddress :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> Address ShelleyAddr

-- | Convert a user-entered ADA amount to lovelace. The TUI accepts amounts
--   as <a>Double</a> for usability (typing decimals), so any precision
--   finer than one lovelace is silently rounded. <a>Double</a> represents
--   integers exactly up to 2^53 lovelace (~9e15), well above any realistic
--   UTxO value, so the only practical loss is sub-lovelace fractional
--   input from the user. The <a>min</a> clamp defends against
--   floating-point overshoot of the form validator's upper bound.
adaToLovelace :: Double -> Integer -> Integer
setPendingAction :: Event -> EventM Name RootState ()

-- | Read the current <a>OpenScreen</a>, if the head is currently
--   <a>Open</a>.
useOpenScreen :: EventM Name RootState (Maybe OpenScreen)

-- | Mutate the current <a>OpenScreen</a>. No-op if the head isn't
--   <a>Open</a>.
zoomOpenScreen :: EventM Name OpenScreen () -> EventM Name RootState ()

-- | Switch to the modal tab, remembering the currently-active tab so we
--   can return to it later via <a>leaveModal</a>.
enterModal :: EventM Name RootState ()

-- | Return from the modal tab to whichever tab was active before.
leaveModal :: EventM Name RootState ()

-- | If the recovery modal is open, rebuild its form from the current
--   <a>$sel:pendingIncrements:ActiveLink</a>. Keeps the user's selection
--   if that deposit is still pending, otherwise falls back to the first
--   entry. If the list is now empty (e.g. the selected deposit was
--   finalized or recovered), close the modal and surface a message in the
--   pending-action slot. Should be called after any node event that may
--   mutate <a>$sel:pendingIncrements:ActiveLink</a>.
refreshRecoveryForm :: EventM Name RootState ()

-- | Run an IO action in a background thread, reporting any exception
--   through the TUI's event channel as a <a>TxBuildError</a> (visible in
--   the pending-action slot). <tt>cleanup</tt> events, if any, are written
--   before the error so the TUI can reset transient loading state. Order
--   matters — <a>TxBuildError</a> is written last so its message wins over
--   anything <tt>cleanup</tt> might display.
--   
--   Forking is essential for any blocking call against the hydra-node or
--   cardano-node: if the remote is unresponsive a synchronous call would
--   block the brick event loop, leaving no way to press Esc or Ctrl-C.
forkWithErrorReport :: BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> Text -> [TUIEvent Tx] -> IO () -> IO ()

-- | Query L1 UTxO at the given address in a background thread. On success,
--   the result is wrapped via <tt>mkResult</tt> and written to the
--   channel. On exception, an empty result is written first (so the TUI
--   clears any loading-state spinner) followed by a <a>TxBuildError</a>
--   with the real cause.
queryL1UTxOAsync :: CardanoClient -> Address ShelleyAddr -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> (Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO) -> TUIEvent Tx) -> Text -> IO ()
recoverCommitAsync :: Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> TxId -> IO ()
externalCommitAsync :: Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> UTxO -> IO ()
triggerL1Query :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> EventM Name RootState ()
triggerL1IfNeeded :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> BChan (TUIEvent Tx) -> EventM Name RootState ()
cycleTab :: ActiveTab -> ActiveTab
prevTab :: ActiveTab -> ActiveTab

module Hydra.TUI.Drawing.MainTab

-- | Render the Main tab: connection<i>network</i>chain status, peers, head
--   parties, head state with UTxOs, and a strip of recent events.
drawMainTab :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> RootState -> Widget Name

-- | Render the API-connection status line (<a>Connected</a> / "Connecting
--   to …").
drawConnectedStatus :: RootState -> Widget n

-- | Render the Hydra-network status line.
drawNetworkState :: ConnectedState -> Widget n

-- | Render the chain-sync status line ("In sync" / "Catching up").
drawChainSyncedState :: ConnectedState -> Widget n

-- | Render the peer list with per-peer connection state.
drawPeers :: ConnectedState -> [(Host, PeerStatus)] -> Widget n

-- | Render a single <a>Party</a> as its hex-encoded verification key with
--   the given attribute.
drawParty :: AttrName -> Party -> Widget n

-- | Vertically stack a list of parties using the given renderer.
drawParties :: (Party -> Widget n) -> [Party] -> Widget n

-- | Render parties with the local party highlighted.
drawPartiesWithOwnHighlighted :: Party -> [Party] -> Widget n

module Hydra.TUI.Drawing.FundsTab

-- | Render the Funds tab: the L2 head state (utxo, pending
--   commits/decommits, active modal flow if any) above the L1 wallet
--   refresh panel.
drawFundsTab :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> RootState -> Widget Name

-- | Render the L1 wallet panel: a spinner while the L1 query is in flight,
--   otherwise the UTxO listing (or a placeholder when empty).
drawL1WalletPanel :: Maybe (Map TxIn (TxOut CtxUTxO)) -> AddressInEra -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

-- | The focus panel shows the active head state in detail. Used by both
--   the Funds tab (L2 section) and the Modal tab.
drawFocusPanel :: NetworkId -> VerificationKey PaymentKey -> UTCTime -> Connection -> Widget Name

-- | Focus panel for an <a>Open</a> head: dispatches to home view or the
--   active modal-form view.
drawFocusPanelOpen :: NetworkId -> VerificationKey PaymentKey -> UTxO -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> OpenScreen -> Widget Name

-- | Focus panel for a <a>Closed</a> head: contestation countdown, active
--   UTxO, pending commits.
drawFocusPanelClosed :: NetworkId -> VerificationKey PaymentKey -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> ClosedState -> Widget Name

-- | Focus panel when fanout is possible.
drawFocusPanelFanout :: NetworkId -> VerificationKey PaymentKey -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

-- | Focus panel for a finalised head.
drawFocusPanelFinal :: NetworkId -> VerificationKey PaymentKey -> UTxO -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

-- | Shared "Pending commits" tail for the Funds tab's focus-panel variants
--   (Closed, FanoutPossible, Final). Returns a list of widgets to be
--   spliced into a surrounding <a>vBox</a>.
drawPendingCommits :: AddressInEra -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> [Widget Name]

-- | Render the remaining time before a deposit becomes recoverable, or a
--   "ready to recover" hint once the deadline has passed.
drawRemainingDepositDeadline :: UTCTime -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

-- | Render the list of pending deposit/increment entries with their
--   status, UTxO outputs, and remaining deadline.
drawPendingIncrement :: AddressInEra -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

-- | Render the recover modal: a radio list of pending deposit ids on top,
--   and a detail panel for the currently-focused deposit (status,
--   deadline, UTxO outputs) below. Keeps one selection per deposit instead
--   of one per output.
drawRecoverFormWithDetail :: AddressInEra -> Form TxId e Name -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

-- | Detail panel for one pending deposit: full TxId, current status,
--   remaining time to the deposit deadline, and the per-output UTxO
--   listing.
drawRecoverDetail :: AddressInEra -> TxId -> [PendingIncrement] -> UTCTime -> Widget Name

module Hydra.TUI.Drawing

-- | Root draw function wiring together the tab bar, active tab, status
--   bar, and action bar.
draw :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> RootState -> [Widget Name]
drawTabBar :: ActiveTab -> Text -> Text -> Widget n
modalTabLabel :: RootState -> Text
drawTab :: ActiveTab -> Text -> ActiveTab -> Widget n
drawTabContent :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> RootState -> Widget Name
drawModalTab :: CardanoClient -> Client Tx IO -> RootState -> Widget Name
drawActionBar :: RootState -> Widget n

module Hydra.TUI

-- | Construct a <a>CardanoClient</a> handle.
mkCardanoClient :: NetworkId -> SocketPath -> CardanoClient
mkBFClient :: NetworkId -> FilePath -> CardanoClient
runWithVty :: IO Vty -> Options -> IO RootState
run :: Options -> IO RootState
